### Packages

```{r setup}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(tidync)
  library(data.table)
  library(sf)
  library(arrow)
  library(units)

})
```

### Climate Periods

```{r climate-periods}

# Climatological Standard Reference Period Normals
crp_beg <- 1961
crp_end <- 1990
crp_lbl <- paste("CRP ", crp_beg, "-", crp_end, sep = "")

# Climatological Period Average
cpa_beg <- 2011
cpa_end <- 2020
cpa_lbl <- paste("CPA ", cpa_beg, "-", cpa_end, sep = "")
```

### Paths

```{r paths}
dir_download <- "_data/1-download/"
dir_transform <- "_data/2-transform/"
```

## Transform data

### Transform land sea mask

```{r transform-land-sea-mask}

fn_transform_land_sea_mask <- function(dir_download) {

  fil <- "land-sea-mask.nc"
  pth <- paste(dir_download, fil, sep = "")
  nc <- tidync(pth)

  df <- nc |>
    hyper_tibble() |>
    as_tibble() |> # tidyverse data frame
    rename(lon = longitude, lat = latitude) |>
    mutate(
      lon = as.numeric(lon),
      lat = as.numeric(lat),
      lsm = as.integer(round(lsm))
    ) |>
    select(lon, lat, lsm) |> # drop all other columns
    arrange(lon, lat)
  return(df)
}

dir <- dir_transform
fil <- "land-sea-mask.parquet"
pth <- paste(dir, fil, sep = "")

if (!file.exists(pth))  {
  land_sea_mask_df <- fn_transform_land_sea_mask(dir_download)
  write_parquet(land_sea_mask_df, pth)
} else {
  land_sea_mask_df <- read_parquet(pth)
}

```

### Transform global coastline

```{r transform-global-coastline}

fn_transform_global_coastline <- function(dir_download) {
  # Create a single coastline multiline, making sure geometries are valid
  # (eliminates extra horizontal line on map)

  fil <- "global-coastline.gpkg"
  pth <- paste(dir_download, fil, sep = "")
  coastline_sf <- st_read(pth, quiet = TRUE)

  coastline_sf <- coastline_sf |>
    select(geom) |>
    mutate(id = "world") |>
    group_by(id) |>
    st_make_valid() |>
    summarise()
  return(coastline_sf)
}

dir <- dir_transform
fil <- "global-coastline.gpkg"
pth <- paste(dir, fil, sep = "")

if (!file.exists(pth))  {
  coastline_sf <- fn_transform_global_coastline(dir_download)
  st_write(coastline_sf, pth, delete_dsn = TRUE, quiet = TRUE)
} else {
  coastline_sf <- st_read(pth, quiet=TRUE)
}

```

### Read NetCDF climate data

```{r read-nc-chunk}

fn_read_nc_chunk <- function(dt, var, vnm, start, stop, ncs_df) {

  setnames(dt, old = "longitude", new = "lon")
  setnames(dt, old = "latitude", new = "lat")
  setnames(dt, old = vnm, new = var)

  dt[, lon := as.numeric(lon)]
  dt[, lat := as.numeric(lat)]
  dt[lon > 180, lon := lon - 360]

  dt[, mth := as.integer(substr(valid_time, 6, 7))]
  setDT(dt)

  # add row before grouping
  cv <- vnm
  if (var == "t") {
    avgcv <- round(mean(dt$t) - 273.15, 3)
    maxcv <- round(max(dt$t) - 273.15, 3)
    mincv <- round(min(dt$t) - 273.15, 3)
    maxdate <- max(dt$valid_time)
    mindate <- min(dt$valid_time)
  } else {
    avgcv <- round(mean(dt$p) * 1000, 3)
    maxcv <- round(max(dt$p) * 1000, 3)
    mincv <- round(min(dt$p) * 1000, 3)
    maxdate <- substr(max(dt$valid_time), 1, 10)
    mindate <- substr(min(dt$valid_time), 1, 10)
  }
  maxlon <- max(dt$lon)
  minlon <- min(dt$lon)
  maxlat <- max(dt$lat)
  minlat <- min(dt$lat)
  datapts <- nrow(dt)

  new_row <- list(
    cv = cv,
    avgcv   = avgcv,
    maxcv   = maxcv,
    mincv   = mincv,
    maxdate = maxdate,
    mindate = mindate,
    maxlon  = maxlon,
    minlon  = minlon,
    maxlat  = maxlat,
    minlat  = minlat,
    datapts = datapts
  )

  ncs_df <- rbind(ncs_df, new_row)

  if (var == "t") {
    drop <- setdiff(names(dt), c("lon", "lat", "mth", "t"))
    dt[, (drop) := NULL]
    dt <- dt[, .(t = sum(t, na.rm = TRUE)), by = .(lon, lat, mth)]
  } else {
    drop <- setdiff(names(dt), c("lon", "lat", "mth", "p"))
    dt[, (drop) := NULL]
    dt <- dt[, .(p = sum(p, na.rm = TRUE)), by = .(lon, lat, mth)]
  }
  setDT(dt)
  gc()

  return(list(dt, ncs_df))
}

```

```{r read-nc}
fn_read_nc <- function(pth, var, vnm, ncs_df) {
  nc <- tidync(pth)

  dims <- nc |> activate(vnm) |> hyper_dims()
  ntime <- dims |> filter(name == "valid_time") |> pull(length)
  chunk <- 60L

  print(paste("chunk size ", chunk))

  for (start in seq(1L, ntime, by = chunk)) {
    chnk_beg <- Sys.time()
    stop <- min(start + chunk - 1L, ntime)

    chunk_dt <- nc |>
      hyper_filter(valid_time = index %in% start:stop) |>
      hyper_tibble(select_var = vnm) |>
      as.data.table()


    result <- fn_read_nc_chunk(chunk_dt, var, vnm, start, stop, ncs_df)
    chunk_grp_dt <- result[[1]]
    ncs_df <- result[[2]]

    if (start == 1L) {
      dt <- chunk_grp_dt
    } else {
      dt <- rbindlist(list(dt, chunk_grp_dt))
      # group
      if (var == "t") {
        dt <- dt[, .(t = sum(t, na.rm = TRUE)), by = .(lon, lat, mth)]
      } else {
        dt <- dt[, .(p = sum(p, na.rm = TRUE)), by = .(lon, lat, mth)]
      }
    }
    chnk_end <- Sys.time()
    print(paste("chunk time: ", (chnk_end - chnk_beg)))
  }

  return(list(dt, ncs_df))
}

```

```{r get-t-data}

fn_get_t_data <- function(dir, cp, ncs_df) {

  cv <- "t"
  vnm <- "t2m"
  fil <- paste(cp, "-era5-", cv, ".nc", sep = "")
  pth <- paste(dir, fil, sep = "")
  result <- fn_read_nc(pth, cv, vnm, ncs_df)
  t_dt <- result[[1]]
  ncs_df <- result[[2]]

  setorder(t_dt, lon, lat, mth)
  setDT(t_dt)

  # convert from sum to avg
  yrs <- ifelse(cp == "crp", 30, 10)
  t_dt[, t := t / yrs]

  # convert from kelvin to celsius
  t_dt[, t := t - 273.15]

  return(list(t_dt, ncs_df))
}
```

```{r get-p-data}

fn_get_p_data <- function(dir, cp, ncs_df) {

  ndy <- data.table(
    mth = 1:12,
    ndays = as.integer(c(31, 28, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31))
  )

  cv <- "p"
  vnm <- "tp"
  fil <- paste(cp, "-era5-", cv, ".nc", sep = "")
  pth <- paste(dir, fil, sep = "")
  result <- fn_read_nc(pth, cv, vnm, ncs_df)
  p_dt <- result[[1]]
  ncs_df <- result[[2]]

  setorder(p_dt, lon, lat, mth)
  setDT(p_dt)

  # convert from sum to avg
  yrs <- ifelse(cp == "crp", 30, 10)
  p_dt[, p := p / yrs]

  # add number of days using lookup table
  p_dt[ndy, ndy := i.ndays, on = "mth"]
  p_dt[, p := p * ndy * 1000]
  p_dt[, ndy := NULL]

  return(list(p_dt, ncs_df))

}
```

### Transform NetCDF climate data

```{r transform-t-data, cp}

fn_transform_t_data <- function(t_dt) {

  # pivot and calculate stats

  t_wide_dt <- t_dt |>
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = c(mth),
      values_from = c("t"),
      names_prefix = "t",
      names_sep = "" # no underscore in new col names
    )

  tcols <- paste0("t", 1:12)
  t_stats_dt <- t_wide_dt |>
    mutate(
      tavg = (t1 + t2 + t3 + t4 + t5 + t6 + t7 + t8 + t9 + t10 + t11 + t12) /
        12,
      tmax = pmax(t1, t2, t3, t4, t5, t6, t7, t8, t9, t10, t11, t12),
      tmin = pmin(t1, t2, t3, t4, t5, t6, t7, t8, t9, t10, t11, t12),
      totm = (t1 + t2 + t3 + t10 + t11 + t12) / 6,
      tats = (t4 + t5 + t6 + t7 + t8 + t9) / 6,
      tg10 = rowSums(across(all_of(tcols), ~ .x >= 10))
    )
  t_stats_df <- t_stats_dt |>
    select(-t1, -t2, -t3, -t4, -t5, -t6, -t7, -t8, -t9, -t10, -t11, -t12)

  return(t_stats_df)
}

```

```{r transform-p-data}

fn_transform_p_data <- function(p_dt) {

  # pivot and calculate stats

  p_wide_dt <- p_dt |>
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = c(mth),
      values_from = c("p"),
      names_prefix = "p",
      names_sep = "" # no underscore in new col names
    )
  
  pcols <- paste0("p", 1:12)
  p_stats_dt <- p_wide_dt |>
    mutate(
      ptot = (p1 + p2 + p3 + p4 + p5 + p6 + p7 + p8 + p9 + p10 + p11 + p12),
      pmax = pmax(p1, p2, p3, p4, p5, p6, p7, p8, p9, p10, p11, p12),
      pmin = pmin(p1, p2, p3, p4, p5, p6, p7, p8, p9, p10, p11, p12),
      pavg = ptot / 12,
      potm = (p1 + p2 + p3 + p10 + p11 + p12),
      pats = (p4 + p5 + p6 + p7 + p8 + p9),
      pmno = pmin(p10, p11, p12, p1, p2, p3),
      pmxo = pmax(p10, p11, p12, p1, p2, p3),
      pmna = pmin(p4, p5, p6, p7, p8, p9),
      pmxa = pmax(p4, p5, p6, p7, p8, p9),
      pl60 = rowSums(across(all_of(pcols), ~ .x < 60))
    )
  p_stats_df <- p_stats_dt |>
    select(-p1, -p2, -p3, -p4, -p5, -p6, -p7, -p8, -p9, -p10, -p11, -p12)

  return(p_stats_df)

}

```

### Calculate grid cell area

```{r calc-grid-area}

fn_calc_area <- function(df) {
  earth_radius_km <- 6371
  lat_grid_degrees <- 0.25
  lon_grid_degrees <- 0.25
  area_df <- df |>
    mutate(
      lat_radians = lat * pi / 180,
      lat_grid_radians = lat_grid_degrees * pi / 180,
      lon_grid_radians = lon_grid_degrees * pi / 180,
      # cell area in km^2
      area = (earth_radius_km^2 *
        lon_grid_radians *
        (sin(lat_radians + lat_grid_radians / 2) -
          sin(lat_radians - lat_grid_radians / 2))) /
        1e6
    ) |>
    select(-lat_radians, -lat_grid_radians, -lon_grid_radians) |>
    select(lat, lon, area, lsm, everything())
  return(area_df)

}
```

### Save transformed climate data

```{r save-climate-data}

fn_create_ncs_df <- function() {
  ncs_df <- data.frame(
    cv      = character(),
    avgcv   = numeric(),
    maxcv   = numeric(),
    mincv   = numeric(),
    maxdate = character(),
    mindate = character(),
    maxlon  = numeric(),
    minlon  = numeric(),
    maxlat  = numeric(),
    minlat  = numeric(),
    datapts = numeric()
  )
  return(ncs_df)
}

fn_save_climate_data <- function (dir_read, dir_save, cp, ncs_df) {
 
  result <- fn_get_t_data(dir_read, cp, ncs_df)
  t_dt <- result[[1]]
  ncs_df <- result[[2]]
  pth <- paste(dir_save, cp, "-monthly-data-t.parquet", sep = "")
  write_parquet(t_dt, pth)

  result <- fn_get_p_data(dir_read, cp, ncs_df)
  p_dt <- result[[1]]
  ncs_df <- result[[2]]
  pth <- paste(dir_save, cp, "-monthly-data-p.parquet", sep = "")
  write_parquet(p_dt, pth)

  pth <- paste(dir_save, cp, "-nc-summary.csv", sep = "")
  write_csv(ncs_df, pth)

  t_stats_df <- fn_transform_t_data(t_dt)
  pth <- paste(dir_save, cp, "-average-stats-t.parquet", sep = "")
  write_parquet(t_stats_df, pth)

  p_stats_df <- fn_transform_p_data(p_dt)
  pth <- paste(dir_save, cp, "-average-stats-p.parquet", sep = "")
  write_parquet(p_stats_df, pth)

  j1_df <- inner_join(t_stats_df, p_stats_df, by = c("lon", "lat"))
  j2_df <- inner_join(j1_df, land_sea_mask_df, by = c("lon", "lat"))
  cn_df <- fn_calc_area(j2_df)
  pth <- paste(dir_save, cp, "-climate-normals.parquet", sep = "")
  write_parquet(cn_df, pth)

}

dir_read <- dir_download
dir_save <- dir_transform

cp <- "cpa"
pth <- paste(dir_save, cp, "-climate-normals.parquet", sep = "")
# only need to read, transform, and save if file doesn't exist
if (!file.exists(pth)) {
  ncs_df <- fn_create_ncs_df()
  fn_save_climate_data(dir_read, dir_save, cp, ncs_df) 
}

cp <- "crp"
pth <- paste(dir_save, cp, "-climate-normals.parquet", sep = "")
# only need to read, transform, and save if file doesn't exist
if (!file.exists(pth)) {
  ncs_df <- fn_create_ncs_df()
  fn_save_climate_data(dir_read, dir_save, cp, ncs_df)  
}

```

## Setup

### Packages

```{r setup}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(tidync)
  library(data.table)
  library(sf)
  library(arrow)
  library(units)

})
```

### Climate Periods

```{r climate-periods}

# Climatological Standard Reference Period Normals
crp_beg <- 1961
crp_end <- 1990
crp_lbl <- paste("CRP ", crp_beg, "-", crp_end, sep = "")

# Climatological Period Average
cpa_beg <- 2011
cpa_end <- 2020
cpa_lbl <- paste("CPA ", cpa_beg, "-", cpa_end, sep = "")
```

### Paths

```{r paths}
dir_download <- "_data/1-download/"
dir_transform <- "_data/2-transform/"
```

## Transform data

### Transform land sea mask

```{r transform-land-sea-mask}

fn_transform_land_sea_mask <- function(dir_download) {

  fil <- "land-sea-mask.nc"
  pth <- paste(dir_download, fil, sep = "")
  nc <- tidync(pth)

  df <- nc |>
    hyper_tibble() |>
    as_tibble() |> # tidyverse data frame
    rename(lon = longitude, lat = latitude) |>
    mutate(
      lon = as.numeric(lon),
      lat = as.numeric(lat),
      lsm = as.integer(round(lsm))
    ) |>
    select(lon, lat, lsm) |> # drop all other columns
    arrange(lon, lat)
  return(df)
}

dir <- dir_transform
fil <- "land-sea-mask.parquet"
pth <- paste(dir, fil, sep = "")

if (!file.exists(pth))  {
  land_sea_mask_df <- fn_transform_land_sea_mask(dir_download)
  write_parquet(land_sea_mask_df, pth)
} else {
  land_sea_mask_df <- read_parquet(pth)
}

```

### Transform global coastline

```{r transform-global-coastline}

fn_transform_global_coastline <- function(dir_download) {
  # Create a single coastline multiline, making sure geometries are valid
  # (eliminates extra horizontal line on map)

  fil <- "global-coastline.gpkg"
  pth <- paste(dir_download, fil, sep = "")
  coastline_sf <- st_read(pth, quiet = TRUE)

  coastline_sf <- coastline_sf |>
    select(geom) |>
    mutate(id = "world") |>
    group_by(id) |>
    st_make_valid() |>
    summarise()
  return(coastline_sf)
}

dir <- dir_transform
fil <- "global-coastline.gpkg"
pth <- paste(dir, fil, sep = "")

if (!file.exists(pth))  {
  coastline_sf <- fn_transform_global_coastline(dir_download)
  st_write(coastline_sf, pth, delete_dsn = TRUE, quiet = TRUE)
} else {
  coastline_sf <- st_read(pth, quiet=TRUE)
}

```

### Read NetCDF climate data

```{r read-nc-chunk}

fn_read_nc_chunk <- function(dt, var, vnm, start, stop, ncs_df) {

  setnames(dt, old = "longitude", new = "lon")
  setnames(dt, old = "latitude", new = "lat")
  setnames(dt, old = vnm, new = var)

  dt[, lon := as.numeric(lon)]
  dt[, lat := as.numeric(lat)]
  dt[lon > 180, lon := lon - 360]

  dt[, mth := as.integer(substr(valid_time, 6, 7))]
  setDT(dt)

  # add row before grouping
  cv <- vnm
  if (var == "t") {
    avgcv <- round(mean(dt$t) - 273.15, 3)
    maxcv <- round(max(dt$t) - 273.15, 3)
    mincv <- round(min(dt$t) - 273.15, 3)
    maxdate <- max(dt$valid_time)
    mindate <- min(dt$valid_time)
  } else {
    avgcv <- round(mean(dt$p) * 1000, 3)
    maxcv <- round(max(dt$p) * 1000, 3)
    mincv <- round(min(dt$p) * 1000, 3)
    maxdate <- substr(max(dt$valid_time), 1, 10)
    mindate <- substr(min(dt$valid_time), 1, 10)
  }
  maxlon <- max(dt$lon)
  minlon <- min(dt$lon)
  maxlat <- max(dt$lat)
  minlat <- min(dt$lat)
  datapts <- nrow(dt)

  new_row <- list(
    cv = cv,
    avgcv   = avgcv,
    maxcv   = maxcv,
    mincv   = mincv,
    maxdate = maxdate,
    mindate = mindate,
    maxlon  = maxlon,
    minlon  = minlon,
    maxlat  = maxlat,
    minlat  = minlat,
    datapts = datapts
  )

  ncs_df <- rbind(ncs_df, new_row)

  if (var == "t") {
    drop <- setdiff(names(dt), c("lon", "lat", "mth", "t"))
    dt[, (drop) := NULL]
    dt <- dt[, .(t = sum(t, na.rm = TRUE)), by = .(lon, lat, mth)]
  } else {
    drop <- setdiff(names(dt), c("lon", "lat", "mth", "p"))
    dt[, (drop) := NULL]
    dt <- dt[, .(p = sum(p, na.rm = TRUE)), by = .(lon, lat, mth)]
  }
  setDT(dt)
  gc()

  return(list(dt, ncs_df))
}

```

```{r read-nc}
fn_read_nc <- function(pth, var, vnm, ncs_df) {
  nc <- tidync(pth)

  dims <- nc |> activate(vnm) |> hyper_dims()
  ntime <- dims |> filter(name == "valid_time") |> pull(length)
  chunk <- 60L

  print(paste("chunk size ", chunk))

  for (start in seq(1L, ntime, by = chunk)) {
    chnk_beg <- Sys.time()
    stop <- min(start + chunk - 1L, ntime)

    chunk_dt <- nc |>
      hyper_filter(valid_time = index %in% start:stop) |>
      hyper_tibble(select_var = vnm) |>
      as.data.table()


    result <- fn_read_nc_chunk(chunk_dt, var, vnm, start, stop, ncs_df)
    chunk_grp_dt <- result[[1]]
    ncs_df <- result[[2]]

    if (start == 1L) {
      dt <- chunk_grp_dt
    } else {
      dt <- rbindlist(list(dt, chunk_grp_dt))
      # group
      if (var == "t") {
        dt <- dt[, .(t = sum(t, na.rm = TRUE)), by = .(lon, lat, mth)]
      } else {
        dt <- dt[, .(p = sum(p, na.rm = TRUE)), by = .(lon, lat, mth)]
      }
    }
    chnk_end <- Sys.time()
    print(paste("chunk time: ", (chnk_end - chnk_beg)))
  }

  return(list(dt, ncs_df))
}

```

```{r get-t-data}

fn_get_t_data <- function(dir, cp, ncs_df) {

  cv <- "t"
  vnm <- "t2m"
  fil <- paste(cp, "-era5-", cv, ".nc", sep = "")
  pth <- paste(dir, fil, sep = "")
  result <- fn_read_nc(pth, cv, vnm, ncs_df)
  t_dt <- result[[1]]
  ncs_df <- result[[2]]

  setorder(t_dt, lon, lat, mth)
  setDT(t_dt)

  # convert from sum to avg
  yrs <- ifelse(cp == "crp", 30, 10)
  t_dt[, t := t / yrs]

  # convert from kelvin to celsius
  t_dt[, t := t - 273.15]

  return(list(t_dt, ncs_df))
}
```

```{r get-p-data}

fn_get_p_data <- function(dir, cp, ncs_df) {

  ndy <- data.table(
    mth = 1:12,
    ndays = as.integer(c(31, 28, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31))
  )

  cv <- "p"
  vnm <- "tp"
  fil <- paste(cp, "-era5-", cv, ".nc", sep = "")
  pth <- paste(dir, fil, sep = "")
  result <- fn_read_nc(pth, cv, vnm, ncs_df)
  p_dt <- result[[1]]
  ncs_df <- result[[2]]

  setorder(p_dt, lon, lat, mth)
  setDT(p_dt)

  # convert from sum to avg
  yrs <- ifelse(cp == "crp", 30, 10)
  p_dt[, p := p / yrs]

  # add number of days using lookup table
  p_dt[ndy, ndy := i.ndays, on = "mth"]
  p_dt[, p := p * ndy * 1000]
  p_dt[, ndy := NULL]

  return(list(p_dt, ncs_df))

}
```

### Transform NetCDF climate data

```{r transform-t-data, cp}

fn_transform_t_data <- function(t_dt) {

  # pivot and calculate stats

  t_wide_dt <- t_dt |>
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = c(mth),
      values_from = c("t"),
      names_prefix = "t",
      names_sep = "" # no underscore in new col names
    )

  tcols <- paste0("t", 1:12)
  t_stats_dt <- t_wide_dt |>
    mutate(
      tavg = (t1 + t2 + t3 + t4 + t5 + t6 + t7 + t8 + t9 + t10 + t11 + t12) /
        12,
      tmax = pmax(t1, t2, t3, t4, t5, t6, t7, t8, t9, t10, t11, t12),
      tmin = pmin(t1, t2, t3, t4, t5, t6, t7, t8, t9, t10, t11, t12),
      totm = (t1 + t2 + t3 + t10 + t11 + t12) / 6,
      tats = (t4 + t5 + t6 + t7 + t8 + t9) / 6,
      tg10 = rowSums(across(all_of(tcols), ~ .x >= 10))
    )
  t_stats_df <- t_stats_dt |>
    select(-t1, -t2, -t3, -t4, -t5, -t6, -t7, -t8, -t9, -t10, -t11, -t12)

  return(t_stats_df)
}

```

```{r transform-p-data}

fn_transform_p_data <- function(p_dt) {

  # pivot and calculate stats

  p_wide_dt <- p_dt |>
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = c(mth),
      values_from = c("p"),
      names_prefix = "p",
      names_sep = "" # no underscore in new col names
    )
  
  pcols <- paste0("p", 1:12)
  p_stats_dt <- p_wide_dt |>
    mutate(
      ptot = (p1 + p2 + p3 + p4 + p5 + p6 + p7 + p8 + p9 + p10 + p11 + p12),
      pmax = pmax(p1, p2, p3, p4, p5, p6, p7, p8, p9, p10, p11, p12),
      pmin = pmin(p1, p2, p3, p4, p5, p6, p7, p8, p9, p10, p11, p12),
      pavg = ptot / 12,
      potm = (p1 + p2 + p3 + p10 + p11 + p12),
      pats = (p4 + p5 + p6 + p7 + p8 + p9),
      pmno = pmin(p10, p11, p12, p1, p2, p3),
      pmxo = pmax(p10, p11, p12, p1, p2, p3),
      pmna = pmin(p4, p5, p6, p7, p8, p9),
      pmxa = pmax(p4, p5, p6, p7, p8, p9),
      pl60 = rowSums(across(all_of(pcols), ~ .x < 60))
    )
  p_stats_df <- p_stats_dt |>
    select(-p1, -p2, -p3, -p4, -p5, -p6, -p7, -p8, -p9, -p10, -p11, -p12)

  return(p_stats_df)

}

```

### Calculate grid cell area

```{r calc-grid-area}

fn_calc_area <- function(df) {
  earth_radius_km <- 6371
  lat_grid_degrees <- 0.25
  lon_grid_degrees <- 0.25
  area_df <- df |>
    mutate(
      lat_radians = lat * pi / 180,
      lat_grid_radians = lat_grid_degrees * pi / 180,
      lon_grid_radians = lon_grid_degrees * pi / 180,
      # cell area in km^2
      area = (earth_radius_km^2 *
        lon_grid_radians *
        (sin(lat_radians + lat_grid_radians / 2) -
          sin(lat_radians - lat_grid_radians / 2))) /
        1e6
    ) |>
    select(-lat_radians, -lat_grid_radians, -lon_grid_radians) |>
    select(lat, lon, area, lsm, everything())
  return(area_df)

}
```

### Save transformed climate data

```{r save-climate-data}

fn_create_ncs_df <- function() {
  ncs_df <- data.frame(
    cv      = character(),
    avgcv   = numeric(),
    maxcv   = numeric(),
    mincv   = numeric(),
    maxdate = character(),
    mindate = character(),
    maxlon  = numeric(),
    minlon  = numeric(),
    maxlat  = numeric(),
    minlat  = numeric(),
    datapts = numeric()
  )
  return(ncs_df)
}

fn_save_climate_data <- function (dir_read, dir_save, cp, ncs_df) {
 
  result <- fn_get_t_data(dir_read, cp, ncs_df)
  t_dt <- result[[1]]
  ncs_df <- result[[2]]
  pth <- paste(dir_save, cp, "-monthly-data-t.parquet", sep = "")
  write_parquet(t_dt, pth)

  result <- fn_get_p_data(dir_read, cp, ncs_df)
  p_dt <- result[[1]]
  ncs_df <- result[[2]]
  pth <- paste(dir_save, cp, "-monthly-data-p.parquet", sep = "")
  write_parquet(p_dt, pth)

  pth <- paste(dir_save, cp, "-nc-summary.csv", sep = "")
  write_csv(ncs_df, pth)

  t_stats_df <- fn_transform_t_data(t_dt)
  pth <- paste(dir_save, cp, "-average-stats-t.parquet", sep = "")
  write_parquet(t_stats_df, pth)

  p_stats_df <- fn_transform_p_data(p_dt)
  pth <- paste(dir_save, cp, "-average-stats-p.parquet", sep = "")
  write_parquet(p_stats_df, pth)

  j1_df <- inner_join(t_stats_df, p_stats_df, by = c("lon", "lat"))
  j2_df <- inner_join(j1_df, land_sea_mask_df, by = c("lon", "lat"))
  cn_df <- fn_calc_area(j2_df)
  pth <- paste(dir_save, cp, "-climate-normals.parquet", sep = "")
  write_parquet(cn_df, pth)

}

dir_read <- dir_download
dir_save <- dir_transform

cp <- "cpa"
pth <- paste(dir_save, cp, "-climate-normals.parquet", sep = "")
# only need to read, transform, and save if file doesn't exist
if (!file.exists(pth)) {
  ncs_df <- fn_create_ncs_df()
  fn_save_climate_data(dir_read, dir_save, cp, ncs_df) 
}

cp <- "crp"
pth <- paste(dir_save, cp, "-climate-normals.parquet", sep = "")
# only need to read, transform, and save if file doesn't exist
if (!file.exists(pth)) {
  ncs_df <- fn_create_ncs_df()
  fn_save_climate_data(dir_read, dir_save, cp, ncs_df)  
}

```
